'''vozadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yumptious|yumptious]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yumptious|yumptious]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vozadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozadhithi|vozadhithi]] || [[word:vozadhiji|vozadhiji]] || [[word:vozadhishi|vozadhishi]] || [[word:vozadhiki|vozadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozadhuthuthu|vozadhuthuthu]] || [[word:vozadhujuju|vozadhujuju]] || [[word:vozadhushushu|vozadhushushu]] || [[word:vozadhukuku|vozadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozadhuthu|vozadhuthu]] || [[word:vozadhuju|vozadhuju]] || [[word:vozadhushu|vozadhushu]] || [[word:vozadhuku|vozadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozadhufthuf|vozadhufthuf]] || [[word:vozadhufjuf|vozadhufjuf]] || [[word:vozadhufshuf|vozadhufshuf]] || [[word:vozadhufkuf|vozadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozadhethe|vozadhethe]] || [[word:vozadheje|vozadheje]] || [[word:vozadheshe|vozadheshe]] || [[word:vozadheke|vozadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozadhothotho|vozadhothotho]] || [[word:vozadhojojo|vozadhojojo]] || [[word:vozadhoshosho|vozadhoshosho]] || [[word:vozadhokoko|vozadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozadhotho|vozadhotho]] || [[word:vozadhojo|vozadhojo]] || [[word:vozadhosho|vozadhosho]] || [[word:vozadhoko|vozadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozadhofthof|vozadhofthof]] || [[word:vozadhofjof|vozadhofjof]] || [[word:vozadhofshof|vozadhofshof]] || [[word:vozadhofkof|vozadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfthĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfjĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfshĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfkĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfthĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfjĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfshĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfkĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfthĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfjĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfshĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozadhĂŻfkĂŻf|vozadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozadhĂŠthĂŠ|vozadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vozadhĂŠjĂŠ|vozadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vozadhĂŠshĂŠ|vozadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vozadhĂŠkĂŠ|vozadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozadhathatha|vozadhathatha]] || [[word:vozadhajaja|vozadhajaja]] || [[word:vozadhashasha|vozadhashasha]] || [[word:vozadhakaka|vozadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozadhatha|vozadhatha]] || [[word:vozadhaja|vozadhaja]] || [[word:vozadhasha|vozadhasha]] || [[word:vozadhaka|vozadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozadhafthaf|vozadhafthaf]] || [[word:vozadhafjaf|vozadhafjaf]] || [[word:vozadhafshaf|vozadhafshaf]] || [[word:vozadhafkaf|vozadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vozadhasha|vozadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozadhshĂ«sha|vozadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozadhrosha|vozadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozadhmusha|vozadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozadhyasha|vozadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozadhnkshĂ«sha|govozadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozadhnkrosha|govozadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozadhnkmusha|govozadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozadhnkyasha|govozadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vozazadhasha|vozazadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozazadhshĂ«sha|vozazadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozazadhrosha|vozazadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozazadhmusha|vozazadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozazadhyasha|vozazadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozazadhnkshĂ«sha|govozazadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozazadhnkrosha|govozazadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozazadhnkmusha|govozazadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozazadhnkyasha|govozazadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vezĂŠdhasha|vezĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vezĂŠdhshĂ«sha|vezĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vezĂŠdhrosha|vezĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vezĂŠdhmusha|vezĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vezĂŠdhyasha|vezĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govezĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|govezĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govezĂŠdhnkrosha|govezĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govezĂŠdhnkmusha|govezĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govezĂŠdhnkyasha|govezĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vozfadhasha|vozfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozfadhshĂ«sha|vozfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozfadhrosha|vozfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozfadhmusha|vozfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozfadhyasha|vozfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozfadhnkshĂ«sha|govozfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozfadhnkrosha|govozfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozfadhnkmusha|govozfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozfadhnkyasha|govozfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
